chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5935 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.26329/2024 2. For hearing of main case 28.04.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Ali Mazgani, Commissioner-I, S.R.B. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondent and Mr. Muhammad Ali Mazgani, Commissioner-I, Sindh Revenue Board state that the impugned notice is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the respondent to take any action as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof, petition appears to have served its purpose and is disposed accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
